title: Rainbow glowing
description: Whenever you glow, you glow rainbow!!
body:
# Rainbow glowing
Version: Release 1.0
## Description
With this simple datapack whenewer you have glowing effect, you will glow rainbow colors, as simple as it sounds. Nickname will change its color too!!

![Raimbow glowing demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DN1WHfRY/images/f1c2d4cd4874b01a9f912a72c7c951f8b165690a.gif)

Works both in singleplayer and multiplayer. Can be incompatible with other datapacks that use teams

Before uninstalling, run `/function rainbow_glowing:utility/delete`. Datapack will remove its traces

## Installation
### Datapack
1. Download Rainbow glowing datapack version;
2. Place it in `saves/[world_name]/datapacks`;
3. Relaunch or or use `/reload` or add before creating the world.
### Mod
1. Download Rainbow glowing mod version;
2. Place it in `mods`.
